message:
feat(builder): Add type-safe comparison and assertion APIs

Extend ZigBuilder with structured APIs for comparison and assertion
generation that leverage TypeConfidence for optimal code paths:

Comparison API:
- emitComparison(op, left, right) - Routes to appropriate runtime
  function based on type confidence
- For certain same-type operands: uses native Zig operators (==, <)
- For uncertain/cross-type: uses runtime.pyAnyEql

Assertion API:
- emitAssertion(left, right, op) - Generates assertion with proper
  equality checking
- For assertEqual: uses emitEqualityComparison
- Supports all comparison operators (eq, ne, lt, le, gt, ge)

Type System:
- CertainType enum for type-based dispatch routing
- CompOp enum for Python comparison operators
- Integration with TypeConfidence for two-flow type system

This provides the foundation for structured comparison generation
that aligns with CPython semantics while maximizing performance for
known types.
